_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Wiy tappude, inna.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan nawnii so hannde yooltee e kala demngal. Kala demngal woni gootol murdin ngurndan.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Libol demde e njeeyru Marks ko bodal. Marks ko kontooji goongaaji, alaa nafa.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Ngurndanu Liana Banyan e {{language}}. Heb {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Kulol Goddo Gawtori: Hol to tii wolde ndee
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Kala tiitoonde e nder dee sifa ko nder mbaadi. Asaluuji 26 innde.
speakFriend.step1Body: Uddit Murdi Din Ngurndan e Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Ngurndanu kala damirde. Naat e Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Caggal nalngo, heban Marks e a winndirtoo IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Wiy tappude, inna."

languageSwitcher.tip: Huutooro binndi demde godde e Damal Durin ngam udditde miijo!
